overall.description: A first-person walk along a coastal dirt path in a video game environment (GTA V), featuring a wooden pier, rocky cliffs with a stilt house, and transitioning to a beach access area with stairs descending to the shore under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal dirt trail alongside beach pier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal dirt path toward the beach access area

entered.detail: long wooden structure extending into the ocean with vertical posts
steep rocky hillside with sparse vegetation and boulders
red wooden building elevated on stilts built into the cliffside
wooden utility poles with overhead wires running along the cliff
low shrubs and dry grass along the edges of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a coastal dirt trail with a wooden pier extending into the ocean on the left and a rocky cliff with a stilt house on the right. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting over the sparse coastal vegetation and empty path.

scene_state.functional_zone: cracked concrete beach access parking area

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt trail to cracked concrete pavement
passing yellow dumpster on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the paved beach access area toward the stop sign

entered.detail: large yellow industrial dumpster sitting on the concrete ground
red octagonal stop sign at the beach access intersection
trash and debris scattered on the ground near the dumpster

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to cracked concrete pavement as the camera passes a yellow dumpster and scattered litter. The stilt house on the rocky cliff grows larger on the right while the wooden pier recedes behind. A stop sign becomes visible ahead at the beach access point.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase descending to beach level under stilt house

events.description: turning left toward the beach and beginning descent down stairs
transitioning from paved area to wooden stairs descending to beach

agents.ego_description: turning left at the stop sign and descending wooden stairs toward the sandy beach

entered.detail: weathered wooden staircase with railings leading down to the beach
sandy shoreline with calm ocean water visible below
white sign on wooden post reading UNLAWFUL TO LITTER

segments.scene_description: Turning left past the stop sign, the camera descends a weathered wooden staircase toward the beach. The stilt house looms overhead providing partial shelter, while the sandy shore and ocean become visible to the left. A litter warning sign stands near the top of the stairs as the descent continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a coastal trail that transitions from a wild dirt path into a weathered beach access point. It begins by moving along a dirt trail flanked by a wooden pier extending into the ocean and a stilt house perched on a rocky cliff under a diffused, overcast sky. As the camera advances, the natural terrain shifts into cracked concrete pavement littered with debris and a yellow dumpster, while the pier recedes and the stilt house looms larger on the right. The scene then opens toward a stop sign at the edge of the path before turning left to descend a weathered wooden staircase. Finally, the camera passes a litter warning sign and moves beneath the shelter of the stilt house, revealing the sandy shore and ocean below.
